# Bay Villas Bay Harbor Islands

### **2026**

3 Stories / 20 Residences of
3 & 4 Bedrooms

**10190 E Bay Harbor Dr, Bay Harbor Islands, FL 33154, USA**

Bay Villas Bay Harbor Islands is a collection of 20 luxurious 3-story villas, offering carefully crafted interiors and breathtaking rooftop terraces. The villas' design is a masterpiece by Kobi Karp. Bay Villas Bay Harbor Islands is conveniently located in Bay Harbor Islands. You'll live just moments away to Miami Beach, Downtown, and Bal Harbour Shops.

CONDOS FOR SALE

CONDOS FOR RENT

## Features

### Building Features

- Controlled property access

### Residence Features

- Three levels of interior living + rootfop terrace
- 2,375 - 2,976 SF of interior space
- Floor-to-ceiling windows
- Interior elevator from garage to rooftop
- Armony Cucine kitchens
- Stone countertops in kitchen & bathrooms
- Pre-wired for smart home automation
- Miele appliance package and coffee system
- Smart dimmer switches
- Indirect lighting in kitchen & primary bathroom
- Base security, camera & Ring system
- Toto toilet in primary bathroom
- Premium plumbing fixtures
- Wood or porcelain flooring selections
- Two-car climate controlled garages

## Developers

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Developer-bay-villas-bay-harbor-islands.jpg)

Regency Development Group is a family-owned global firm established in Chicago, Illinois. Since 2004, it has spent almost twenty years designing and constructing a wide variety of high-quality residences. Partnering with leading architects and experts, Regency ensures each project is modern, distinctive, and truly a place to call home

# Bay Villas

10190 E Bay Harbor Dr Bay Harbor Islands FL 33154

Bay Villas is an exclusive pre-construction townhome development located at 10190 E Bay Harbor Drive in the prestigious [Bay Harbor Islands](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/bay-harbor-islands-condos "Bay Harbor Islands"). Developed by Regency Development Group, this boutique project will feature 20 luxury residences across two three-story buildings. The architectural design is crafted by the renowned firm Kobi Karp Architecture & Interior Design, with interiors envisioned by Arhidiza, and lush tropical landscaping by the acclaimed Enzo Enea of Enea Garden Design . Construction of Bay Villas is anticipated to be completed by late 2026.

Bay Villas offers a selection of spacious three- and four-bedroom townhomes, each designed with modern elegance and comfort in mind. Residences will boast open-concept [floor plans](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/bay-harbor-villas/floor-plans "floor plans"), private rooftop terraces, and high-end finishes throughout. Features include gourmet kitchens with premium appliances, expansive living areas with floor-to-ceiling windows, and private elevators in select units, providing a seamless blend of luxury and functionality.

Residents of Bay Villas will enjoy a suite of upscale amenities, including a state-of-the-art fitness center, a rooftop swimming pool with panoramic views, and a beautifully landscaped courtyard that serves as a tranquil retreat. Additional services encompass 24-hour security, concierge assistance, and secure parking, ensuring a lifestyle of convenience and peace of mind.

Situated in the heart of Bay Harbor Islands, Bay Villas offers unparalleled access to a variety of local attractions. A short stroll leads to the renowned Bal Harbour Shops, pristine beaches, and a diverse array of dining options. Families will appreciate the proximity to the top-rated Ruth K. Broad Bay Harbor K–8 Center, just half a mile away. For outdoor enthusiasts, nearby parks such as 92nd Street Park and the Bay Harbor Islands Tot Lot offer recreational spaces for all ages. The development’s prime location also ensures easy access to Miami’s vibrant cultural scene and major transportation hubs.
